case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. OLIVIA SANCHEZ VALVERIO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT OLIVIA SANCHEZ VALVERIO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,941.72 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT VALVERIO, OLIVIA SANCHEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALVERIO, OLIVIA SANCHEZ $1,941.72 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,056.72 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
